\tzpentry{ID4815}{Text Magnetization Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4815 introduces Text Magnetization Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\Phi_{\\text{total}} = \\sum_{j=1}^{153,600} \\phi_j \\otimes \\mathcal{M}_{\\text{entanglement}}\n\\end{equation}
